frontmatter_compliance.notes: Required fields present; valid semver; no angle brackets; allowed-tools hyphenated. owns.directories ['skills/'] is a meta-level claim that conflicts ideologically with the agent ownership model. Description 595 chars (under ceiling, over target).

description_quality.notes: Action verb and 9 keyword variants, but references stale skill names (skill-deep-review, skill-audit) which are both archived. 595 chars ~3x the 200-char target.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 142 lines / ~1017 words. Both references linked with when-to-read context. Both under 300-line TOC threshold.

instruction_clarity.notes: Numbered Steps 1-5 with imperative voice. Impact/Effort scoring explicit. Explicit edit-application rules. Error Handling and Guidelines concrete.

coordination.notes: composes_with [skill-review, skill-writer, sync-skills] all real. spawned_by empty correct. owns.directories ['skills/'] is broad — could conflict but is probably correct as meta-level claim.

completeness.notes: Both reference files exist. Validation checklist concrete. BUT: 5 stale references to archived skills erode trust in the doc.

anti_patterns.notes: Guidelines warn against batch reformatting and pure-style edits. Imperative voice. Read-before-edit rule. No emojis. Minor: L100 says '~100 lines' but house style is 200/500.

critical.item: Body and description reference archived skills skill-deep-review and skill-audit (5 instances)
critical.fix: Replace all references with skill-review (the consolidated skill that now covers both modes via --scope=all and --scope=<name>).

important.item: Line-count guidance at L100 says '~100 lines' but house style is 200/500
important.fix: Change to '≤5,000 words and ≤500 lines (soft warnings); flag past ~200 lines when content could move to references.'

important.item: owns.directories ['skills/'] may collide with agent-ownership model
important.fix: Add body comment noting this is a meta-level write claim distinct from agent-role ownership map for project source directories.

nits.fix: After replacing stale skill names, trim trigger-phrase list to 5 strongest variants.

nits.item: Frontmatter spec reference uses full path inconsistent with sibling refs
nits.fix: Decide on a consistent reference style (full path vs relative).

nits.item: Hardcoded sync-skills.sh path at L120 is brittle
nits.fix: Invoke as /sync-skills slash command instead of hardcoded script path.

top_fixes.fix: Replace all 5 stale references to skill-deep-review and skill-audit with skill-review
Update line-count guidance at L100 to match house style (500 lines / 5000 words)
Document meta-level scope of owns.directories ['skills/'] in body Guidelines

broken_refs: skill-deep-review (in skills/archive/, not active ecosystem) — referenced at SKILL.md:5,24,33,45
skill-audit (in skills/archive/, not active ecosystem) — referenced at SKILL.md:5,24,29,33,45
